title: Introduction to AI
description: Free nontechnical introduction to artificial intelligence concepts, problem solving, machine learning, neural networks, and societal implications.
durationNote: Official page did not display a total duration during verification.
learningObjectives: Understand foundational AI concepts.
Explore machine learning, neural networks, and societal implications.
accountRequirements: Sign up or log in is required for complete access. The page states access is free.
freeStatusVerification: Verified on the official Elements of AI course page, which states users can sign up or log in for complete access and that it is free.
certificateAvailability: No certificate claim is made from the verified page.
evidenceNote: Official Elements of AI page verifies current title, provider, course outline, sign-up/login requirement for complete access, and free access.

title: What is generative AI?
description: Beginner Microsoft Learn module explaining generative AI capabilities, responsible AI principles, and Microsoft 365 Copilot productivity context.
durationNote: Official page lists 6 units but did not display a total duration during verification.
learningObjectives: Describe generative AI and its capabilities.
Understand responsible AI principles for generative AI applications.
Explain how Microsoft 365 Copilot uses generative AI.
prerequisites: Familiarity with basic AI concepts and terminology
Basic understanding of Microsoft 365 applications and services
accountRequirements: No account required to view the module page. Microsoft Learn sign-in is required to earn a pass designation on a profile.
freeStatusVerification: Verified public Microsoft Learn module access; no payment requirement was presented during verification.
certificateAvailability: Microsoft Learn page says signed-in users can earn a pass designation on their profile; no paid certificate claim is made.
evidenceNote: Official Microsoft Learn module page verifies current title, provider, level, units, objectives, prerequisites, and profile pass requirement.

title: Explore responsible AI

durationNote: Official page lists 7 units but did not display a total duration during verification.

Assess ethical and security concerns associated with deepfakes.
Evaluate human-AI interaction factors such as privacy, bias, transparency, and legal liability.

accountRequirements: No account required to view the module page. Microsoft Learn sign-in is required to earn a pass designation on a profile. The page also displays an Azure account prompt, but no Azure activity was verified as required for page access.

title: Building AI
description: Free follow-on Elements of AI course covering practical AI methods, machine learning, neural networks, and AI idea development across flexible difficulty levels.
durationNote: Official Elements of AI page lists approximately 50 hours.
learningObjectives: Learn practical methods that make artificial intelligence a reality.
Study machine learning and neural networks.
Craft and present an AI idea.
accountRequirements: Create account or log in to participate. The course page states the online course is free of charge.
freeStatusVerification: Verified on the official Building AI page, which states the online course is free of charge and that an electronic certificate can be purchased.
certificateAvailability: Optional paid electronic certificate is available after successful completion.
evidenceNote: Official Building AI page verifies current title, provider, free course access, optional paid certificate, basic understanding level, and approximately 50-hour duration.

title: NIST AI RMF Playbook
description: Public guided reference activity using selected NIST AI RMF Playbook sections with an internal Pathfinder governance reflection before assigning completion credit.

freeStatusVerification: Verified public .gov resource access; no payment or account requirement was presented during verification.
evidenceNote: Official NIST AIRC page verifies current title, provider, public playbook purpose, voluntary use, and Govern/Map/Measure/Manage function coverage. Completion credit requires an internal Pathfinder activity.
